response.justification: Bogdan has strong experience in software development and leadership, particularly in distributed systems, low-latency applications, and DevOps practices. However, his primary expertise is not in C++ or large-scale infrastructure (his longest C++ role was 6 months). His cloud architecture experience is limited, and he lacks the direct technical leadership in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required. His strengths lie more in full-stack and embedded systems development.
strengths: Extensive experience in distributed systems, low-latency applications, and DevOps practices (e.g., Docker, CI/CD, Kubernetes).
Proven leadership in mentoring teams and facilitating technical workshops (e.g., Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos).
Strong background in software craftsmanship with TDD, pairing, and trunk-based development.
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only 6 months at National Instruments; resume does not meet the 8-year minimum).
No explicit production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs.
Lacks 2+ years of direct technical leadership in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as preferred.
